title: Switch to English updates landing page text and persists after reload
description: Verifies that switching to English updates the landing page content and the preference persists after a page reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the language toggle to switch to English.
Reload the page.
Verify the landing page content is displayed in English after reload.

title: Navigate to sections via sticky menu and open contact modal
description: Verifies that the sticky navigation scrolls to key landing page sections and that the primary CTA opens the contact modal successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click a top navigation link to a mid-page section (for example Tours).
Click a top navigation link to another section (for example Contact).
Click the primary CTA in the navigation to contact.
Verify the contact modal is visible.

title: Mobile hamburger menu navigates to a section and auto-closes
description: Verifies that on a small viewport the hamburger menu opens, selecting a section link scrolls the page, and the menu auto-closes.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Resize the viewport to a small mobile size.
Click the hamburger icon to open the mobile menu.
Click a mobile menu item that navigates to a lower section (for example Reviews or Contact).
Verify the mobile menu is closed.
Verify the page is scrolled to the selected section.

title: Contact sidebar is visible and provides quick access to contact channels
description: User can see the right-side contact sidebar and it presents multiple contact channel entry points.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the tours section
Verify the contact sidebar is visible
Verify multiple contact channel icons are displayed in the sidebar

title: Launch WhatsApp contact from the modal in a new tab/deep link
description: User can click WhatsApp in the contact modal and the browser initiates navigation to the WhatsApp target without breaking the current page session.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click a call-to-action that opens the contact modal
Click the WhatsApp contact option in the modal
Verify the WhatsApp link is configured to open a new tab or deep link target

title: Switch back to Vietnamese updates landing page text immediately
description: Verifies that switching back to Vietnamese updates the landing page content without requiring a reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the language toggle to switch to English.
Click the language toggle to switch to Vietnamese.
Verify the landing page content is displayed in Vietnamese.

title: Open Zalo from the contact sidebar
description: User can click the Zalo icon in the contact sidebar and the browser initiates navigation to the Zalo chat target.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the Zalo contact option in the sidebar
Verify the Zalo option is configured with an external URL or deep link target

title: Launch Zalo contact from the modal
description: User can click Zalo in the contact modal and the browser initiates navigation to the Zalo chat target without UI errors.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click a call-to-action that opens the contact modal
Click the Zalo contact option in the modal
Verify the Zalo link is configured with an external URL or deep link target

title: Initiate a phone call from the contact sidebar
description: User can click the phone icon in the contact sidebar and the browser initiates a call via a tel link.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the phone contact option in the sidebar
Verify the phone option uses a tel link

title: Hero CTA opens the contact modal
description: Verifies that a hero call-to-action intended for contacting opens the contact modal successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the hero call-to-action intended to contact the company.
Verify the contact modal is visible.

title: Open contact modal from a landing-page CTA
description: User can open the contact modal from a CTA on the landing page and sees the available contact channels.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click a call-to-action that opens the contact modal
Verify the contact modal is visible
Verify contact channel options are displayed in the modal

title: Contact CTA from navbar works after switching language
description: Verifies that switching the language does not break the navbar contact CTA and it still opens the contact modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the language toggle to switch to English.
Click the primary CTA in the navigation to contact.
Verify the contact modal is visible.

title: Submit contact form successfully with required fields and optional fields
description: Verifies a visitor can submit the inquiry form with required and optional inputs and receives a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the Contact section
Fill a full name into the full name field
Fill a phone number into the phone field
Fill an email into the email field
Select a tour of interest from the tour dropdown
Fill a valid number into the group size field
Select a valid expected date in the date field
Fill a short note into the additional notes field
Submit the contact form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Launch Gmail email composer from the modal in a new tab
description: User can click Gmail in the contact modal and the browser initiates an email compose action via a mailto link.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click a call-to-action that opens the contact modal
Click the Gmail contact option in the modal
Verify the Gmail option uses a mailto link and is configured to open via a new tab or external handler

title: Expand and collapse a tour itinerary accordion
description: Verifies a visitor can open a tour itinerary to read details and then collapse it again.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the Tours section
Expand a tour's itinerary accordion
Verify the expanded itinerary details are displayed for the selected tour
Collapse the same tour's itinerary accordion
Verify the itinerary details are no longer displayed for the selected tour

title: Open contact modal from a tour card CTA
description: Verifies a visitor can start an inquiry from a tour card by opening the contact modal via the tour CTA.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the Tours section
Click a tour card contact CTA to enquire
Verify the contact modal is open
Close the contact modal
Verify the landing page remains usable after closing the modal

title: Language toggle remains accessible and usable after section navigation
description: Verifies that after navigating through sections, the language toggle remains available and the page continues to respond to navigation actions.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click a top navigation link to scroll to a lower section (for example FAQ).
Scroll back near the top of the page.
Click the language toggle to switch languages.
Verify the landing page content updates to the newly selected language.

title: Language choice persists across navigation within landing page sections
description: Verifies that after selecting a language, in-page navigation to other sections keeps content in the chosen language.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the language toggle to switch to English.
Click a navigation link to scroll to the Tours section.
Click a navigation link to scroll to the FAQ section.
Verify content in the current section is displayed in English.

title: Dismiss contact modal using the close control
description: User can close the contact modal using the modal close control and continue browsing the landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click a call-to-action that opens the contact modal
Dismiss the modal using the modal close control
Verify the contact modal is not visible

title: Blog CTA card routes visitors back to the landing page contact section
description: Verifies that the blog CTA card navigates back to the landing page and lands the visitor at the contact section to start an enquiry.

steps.description: Navigate to /blog.html
Click the blog CTA card to contact
Verify the landing page contact section is displayed

title: Hero background rotates automatically over time
description: Verifies that the hero section background changes automatically on an interval without user interaction.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Observe the hero background state.
Wait for 6 seconds.
Verify the hero background has changed from its initial state.

title: Contact CTA remains usable after interacting with itinerary accordion
description: Verifies the tour enquiry CTA still opens the contact modal after the user has expanded/collapsed itineraries.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the Tours section
Expand a tour's itinerary accordion
Collapse the itinerary accordion
Click the same tour card contact CTA to enquire
Verify the contact modal is open
Close the contact modal
Verify the Tours section remains browsable after closing the modal

title: Hero CTA scrolls to Tours section
description: Verifies that a hero call-to-action intended to browse tours scrolls the page to the Tours section.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the hero call-to-action intended to view tours.
Verify the page is scrolled to the Tours section.

title: Contact modal can be dismissed and browsing can continue
description: Verifies that the contact modal can be closed via a standard dismissal control and the user can continue navigating the page afterwards.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the primary CTA in the navigation to contact.
Close the contact modal using the modal close control.
Click a navigation link to scroll to another section (for example Tours).
Verify the contact modal is not visible.
Verify the page is scrolled to the selected section.

title: Tour cards render consistently and are discoverable by scrolling
description: Verifies visitors can reach the Tours section and see multiple tour cards presented for selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the Tours section
Verify multiple tour cards are displayed
Scroll within the Tours section to view additional tour cards (if present)
Verify tour cards remain visible and selectable after scrolling

title: Dismiss contact modal by clicking the overlay
description: User can dismiss the contact modal by clicking outside the modal on the overlay.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click a call-to-action that opens the contact modal
Click the modal overlay outside the modal content
Verify the contact modal is not visible

title: Language persists after opening and closing the contact modal
description: Verifies that opening and closing the contact modal does not reset the selected language.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Click the language toggle to switch to English.
Click the primary CTA to open the contact modal.
Close the contact modal using the modal close control.
Verify the landing page content remains displayed in English.

title: Blog listing renders article cards in a grid
description: Verifies that the blog listing page loads and displays a grid of blog article cards for discovery.

steps.description: Navigate to /blog.html
Verify a grid of blog article cards is displayed

title: Review slider autoplay advances through reviews
description: Verifies the reviews slider automatically advances to a different review without user interaction.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the Reviews section
Wait for the reviews slider to autoplay
Verify the visible review changes after waiting

title: Hamburger menu open/close toggles reliably on mobile
description: Verifies that the mobile hamburger menu can be opened and closed without selecting a navigation item.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Resize the viewport to a small mobile size.
Click the hamburger icon to open the mobile menu.
Click the hamburger icon again to close the mobile menu.
Verify the mobile menu is closed.

title: Only one itinerary accordion stays open when switching tours
description: Verifies switching between tour itinerary accordions results in only the latest selected itinerary remaining open.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the Tours section
Expand a tour's itinerary accordion
Expand a different tour's itinerary accordion
Verify only one itinerary is expanded at a time
Collapse the currently expanded itinerary accordion
Verify no itinerary details are displayed

title: Enforce single-open behavior in the FAQ accordion
description: User can open an FAQ item, opening a different item collapses the previous one, and clicking the open item collapses it.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the FAQ section
Click an FAQ question to expand it
Click a different FAQ question to expand it
Click the currently open FAQ question to collapse it
Verify no FAQ answer is expanded

title: About counters animate when scrolled into view
description: Verifies that scrolling to the About section triggers the counters to animate from 0 up to their target values.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the About section
Wait for the counters animation to complete
Verify the About counters display their final non-zero target values

title: Navigate reviews using previous and next controls
description: Verifies visitors can browse reviews by using the slider prev/next controls and the displayed review updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the Reviews section
Click the next review control
Click the previous review control
Verify the visible review updates when navigating with prev/next controls

title: Jump to a review using slider dots
description: Verifies visitors can jump directly to a specific review slide via the dot navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the Reviews section
Click a non-active slider dot
Verify a different review slide is displayed after selecting a dot

title: Hero slideshow continues rotating after interacting with navigation
description: Verifies that interacting with the page (scrolling/navigating sections) does not stop the hero slideshow from continuing to rotate.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Observe the hero background state.
Click a navigation link to scroll to a mid-page section (for example About).
Click a navigation link to return to the top section (for example Home).
Wait for 6 seconds.
Verify the hero background has changed from its initial state.

title: Tour accordion toggle works repeatedly without breaking layout
description: Verifies repeatedly expanding and collapsing the same tour itinerary continues to work reliably.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the Tours section
Expand a tour's itinerary accordion
Collapse the same tour's itinerary accordion
Expand the same tour's itinerary accordion again
Verify the itinerary details are displayed again without visual overlap or missing content
Collapse the itinerary accordion
Verify the itinerary details are hidden again

title: Phone required field blocks submission when missing
description: Verifies leaving the required phone field empty prevents form submission and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the Contact section
Fill a full name into the full name field
Select a tour of interest from the tour dropdown
Fill a valid number into the group size field
Select a valid expected date in the date field
Submit the contact form
Verify a validation error is displayed for the missing required phone field

title: Expand and collapse an FAQ item by clicking the same question
description: User can toggle an FAQ answer open and closed by clicking the same question.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the FAQ section
Click an FAQ question to expand it
Click the same FAQ question again
Verify the FAQ answer is collapsed

title: Blog article placeholder link does not break browsing session
description: Verifies that clicking a blog article card opens its placeholder destination without breaking the site experience for the current tab.

steps.description: Navigate to /blog.html
Click a blog article card
Verify the current page remains usable and does not display a browser error page

title: Slider remains operable after manual navigation
description: Verifies after clicking prev/next and dots, the slider continues to function and display reviews normally.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the Reviews section
Click the next review control
Click a slider dot
Click the previous review control
Verify a review is displayed and slider controls remain usable

title: Counters do not restart when scrolling away and back
description: Verifies that once the About counters have finished counting up, scrolling away and returning does not restart the animation.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the About section
Wait for the counters animation to complete
Scroll to a section far below About
Scroll back to the About section
Verify the About counters remain at their final values and do not count up again

title: HTML5 validation prevents submission when required fields are empty
description: Verifies the form cannot be submitted with missing required fields and the browser displays validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the Contact section
Submit the contact form without filling required fields
Verify a required-field validation error is displayed and submission does not complete

title: Hover reveals labels on contact sidebar icons
description: User can hover over contact sidebar icons and see their labels reveal for better discoverability.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the middle of the page
Hover over a contact icon in the sidebar
Verify the hovered contact option reveals a label or expanded state

title: Group size required field blocks submission when missing
description: Verifies leaving the required group size field empty prevents form submission and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the Contact section
Fill a full name into the full name field
Fill a phone number into the phone field
Select a tour of interest from the tour dropdown
Select a valid expected date in the date field
Submit the contact form
Verify a validation error is displayed for the missing required group size field

title: FAQ accordion remains usable after scrolling through the page
description: User can still expand an FAQ item after scrolling through other sections and returning to the FAQ section.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the FAQ section
Scroll to the contact section
Scroll back to the FAQ section
Click an FAQ question to expand it
Verify the selected FAQ answer is visible

title: Counters remain visible and readable after animation ends
description: Verifies that after the count-up completes, the counters remain visible and stable for continued browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Scroll to the About section
Wait for the counters animation to complete
Verify all counters in the About section are visible and show numeric values

title: Blog page does not show a broken language toggle UI
description: Verifies that the blog listing page does not expose a non-functional language toggle that could confuse users.

steps.description: Navigate to /blog.html
Verify there is no language toggle control displayed on the blog page
